specific_question: In Q4 2024, how did Elexion’s IT department reduce data storage costs across its cloud analytics systems?
answer: Internal IT performance metrics from Q4 2024 indicate that Elexion lowered its annual cloud storage costs by 18% through a migration to a hybrid on-premise system.
